access.notGated: Enable gated access to review access requests.
access.title: Access requests

delete.body: This permanently deletes {{repoId}} and all of its files. This cannot be undone.
delete.title: Delete repository

duplicate.body: Create a copy of {{repoId}} under a new id.
duplicate.label: Destination repo id
duplicate.title: Duplicate repository

gatedHint.body: Your access token does not include the manage-repos scope, so repository administration is disabled.
gatedHint.title: Missing permission

empty.body: Repositories you own will show up here.
empty.title: No repositories yet

refs.branchesHint: Create a branch, or delete one by name.
refs.tagsHint: Create a tag on main, or delete one by name.
refs.title: Branches & tags

rename.body: Move {{repoId}} to a new name or namespace. All files, likes and downloads move with it.
rename.label: New repo id
rename.title: Rename or move

settings.gatedHint: Require users to request access before downloading.
settings.privateHint: Only you and collaborators can see this repo.
settings.title: Settings

signedOut.body: Your models, datasets and Spaces appear here once you are signed in.
signedOut.title: Sign in to manage your repositories

restart.factoryHint: Factory rebuild clears the build cache and rebuilds the Space from scratch.
restart.title: Restart

secrets.title: Secrets
secrets.writeOnly: Secret values are write-only and are never shown again after saving.
